description: Skill-selection eval prompts for certificate-skills Anthropic-style skill packages.

cases.prompt: Show the SSL certificate chain, TLS version, cipher suite, OCSP stapling status, and handshake timing for example.com.
assertions: Selects certificate-info for raw certificate and TLS connection details.
Does not select certificate-analysis unless the user asks for scoring or a security assessment.

cases.prompt: Check whether a host is vulnerable to Heartbleed, POODLE, ROBOT, FREAK, Logjam, Sweet32, BEAST, CRIME, DROWN, or insecure renegotiation.
assertions: Selects tls-vulnerability-scanner for named TLS vulnerability checks.
Does not substitute generic certificate security scanning for TLS exploit probes.

cases.prompt: Create a CRL signed by my CA that revokes serial numbers 01A3 and 01A4 with key-compromise reason codes.
assertions: Selects crl-generator for creating a signed Certificate Revocation List.
Uses revocation reason codes when requested.

cases.prompt: Use my private CA certificate and key to issue a server authentication certificate for api.internal.example.
assertions: Selects ca-signer for issuing a leaf certificate from an existing CA.
Does not select certificate-generator unless the user asks for a self-signed certificate or CA creation.

cases.prompt: Generate authorized phishing detection test certificates for homoglyph and typosquatting variants of example.com.
assertions: Selects domain-variants for lookalike domain certificate test cases.
Keeps the workflow scoped to authorized security research.
